name: stats_mean

description.short: Compute the arithmetic mean of a data vector
description.long: Computes the arithmetic mean (average) of a vector of floating-point numbers. This is the sum of all values divided by the count of values.

complexity.algorithm: Linear summation with Kahan compensation for numerical stability

numerical_notes: Uses compensated summation to minimize floating-point error accumulation for large datasets.
phi_notes: The mean of a Fibonacci-like sequence converges to a value related to φ as the sequence grows.
